mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run (id, task_id, agent_type, target_chunk_id, target_symbol, status, step_count, tool_call_count, model_call_count, summary, started_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{taskId}, #{agentType}, #{targetChunkId}, #{targetSymbol}, #{status}, #{stepCount}, #{toolCallCount}, #{modelCallCount}, #{summary}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, agent_type, target_chunk_id, target_symbol, status, step_count, tool_call_count, model_call_count, summary, started_at, completed_at FROM agent_run WHERE task_id=#{taskId} ORDER BY started_at, id
